feed.title: Nima Rezaeian
feed.subtitle: Independent research notes, technical explanations, and longer-form writing.

entry.title: Welcome
entry.content:
This is a starter post for the site. It is here to exercise the writing features that matter for research notes and explanation posts: sections, math, citations, and code.

Math

Inline math such as (E = mc^2) should render, and display equations should work as well:

\[\mathcal{L}(\theta) = -\sum_i \log p_\theta(y_i \mid x_i)\]

References

Minima keeps the site simple, so references can live inline or at the bottom of a post. For example: Donald Knuth’s “Literate Programming” is still a useful model for technical writing that exposes both the result and the reasoning behind it.

Code

def explain(x):
    return {"claim": x, "evidence": []}
entry.summary: A starter post for the new research writing site.
